mapper.select: SELECT -- 显式排除 description、h5_head_code t.id, t.textbook_name, t.type, t.textbook_publishing_house, t.textbook_publishing_time, t.textbook_author_id, t.textbook_version, t.release_status, t.review_status, t.classification, t.author_name, t.executive_editor, t.textbook_english_name, t.version_number, t.creator, t.add_datetime, t.operator, t.operation_datetime FROM textbook t INNER JOIN ( SELECT textbook_id, MAX(add_datetime) AS last_study_time FROM learning_log WHERE creator = #{userId} GROUP BY textbook_id ) r ON r.textbook_id = t.id ORDER BY r.last_study_time DESC LIMIT COALESCE(#{limit}, 10)
